_meta.purpose: Initial empty schema for the persisted cross-run ledger. Mirrored into Persist.get_state() and written to disk on save(). Per PERSISTENCE.md §layer 4 + §Ledger.
_meta.note: Zero lore. This is the *shape* of the running ledger file. New captains append; nothing rewrites prior entries. AI-managed: cross-run aggregation happens in INK_BEAT writes, not here.

captain_record.t_slots: array of 3 strings — trait IDs (TRAITS.md T-pool)
captain_record.h_tier_peak: int — peak H-tier reached this run (1-4)
captain_record.outcome: string — final outcome tag from a closed enum
captain_record.discoveries: array of strings — discovery IDs surfaced this run
captain_record.casualties: array of crew-casualty objects (append-only within run)

crew_casualty.captain_known_n: int — what the captain was known as when this casualty occurred

he3_dismantling.progress_pct: int — 0-100, contributed by discovery acts, monotonic
he3_dismantling.discovery_acts: array of unlocked discovery-act IDs (uuid-like strings)
he3_dismantling.alt_nexuses_mapped: array of mapped alt-fuel nexus IDs
he3_dismantling.mo_mode: int — current oligarch MO mode (1=low, 5=panic; see reactive-MO rules)

npc_state.bond_momentum: float — average past bond-score; biases future bonds
npc_state.known_about_player: array of strings — what they think they know

schema.captain_cascades: array of cascade entries — AI-pattern recognitions

cascade_entry.tag_text: short — phrase-level tag the AI surfaces in dispatches
